Safe for anyone above 4 yrs old and stop Excessive Hair Shedding in One Week! 一款天然有机的植物萃取养护头皮头发系统，有助于恢复头皮健康、抑制双氢睾酮（DHT），并激活休眠毛囊，让秀发显著加密更显丰盈。安全温和，4岁以上人群均可放心使用，助您在短短一周内有效减少过度掉发！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Orofill Golden Serum / Health+ Orofill Revive
programme.desc: Made from 100% pure Tibetan Sea Buckthorn, containing over 190 nutrients. Use the Golden Serum to smooth fine lines, skin problems and wound recovery, while taking the Revive Softgels for anti-aging and and support mucous membranes. Both together rejuvenates your body inside and out, providing vital immunity and menopausal support for women, and gentle, safe care for everyone, ensuring a healthy, youthful glow for all ages. 采用100%纯正西藏沙棘制成，富含190多种营养成分。外用黄金修复液有助于抚平细纹，缓解皮肤问题，加速伤口愈合；口服焕活软胶囊则有助于抗衰老、溃疡愈合，并滋养黏膜。两者结合使用，由内而外焕活身心，提供免疫力支持和女性更年期舒缓，温和安全，呵护健康，令肌肤焕发青春光彩。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kplass Cough and Flu Relief Patch
programme.desc: Drug-free patches use Far Infrared and acupoint therapy to relieve cold and flu symptoms naturally. The Cold & Flu Patch eases a blocked nose, sinus pressure and chills. The Cough Relief Patch comes in adult and child versions to soothe coughs and calm throat irritation for easier breathing. Safe for daily use, they offer up to 6 hours of comfort for the whole family. 无需药物的贴布，结合远红外线和穴位疗法，自然缓解感冒症状。感冒缓解贴舒缓鼻塞、流鼻涕、鼻窦压力和寒冷不适。止咳贴有成人装和儿童装，帮助缓解咳嗽、喉咙不适，同时促进血液循环，让呼吸更顺畅、睡眠更安心。温和贴肤，每天可用，长达6小时舒适守护，全家都适用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Q’SAI Knee Supporter Collagen
programme.desc: QSAI Knee Supporter Collagen, cumulative sales exceed 50 million pieces as of Jan 2024, delivers highly absorbable collagen peptides, Hyaluronic Acid, and Chondroitin to nourish joints and cartilage, relieve joint pain. Its tasteless, odorless powder blends effortlessly into any food or drink, making it perfect for daily joint care, especially for those who prefer not to take pills. Q’SAI 膝之助胶原蛋白粉 QSAI 护膝胶原蛋白粉，截至2024年1月累计销量已超过5000万盒，富含高吸收性的胶原蛋白肽、玻尿酸和软骨素，有助滋养关节和软骨、缓解关节疼痛。其无味无臭的粉末状配方，可轻松加入任何食物或饮料中服用，是日常关节护理的理想之选，尤其适合那些不想服用药片的人士。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Cheong Dam Black Change Shampoo
programme.desc: Grey Hair Coverage in just 5 washes! 全新4合1遮白洗发水：含天然成分，白发5天内变黑发！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Panasonic EH-NA9M
programme.desc: Combat dryness and elevate your hair care with Panasonic EH-NA9M. Its nanoe™ and Mineral Ion technology infuse moisture deep into strands and scalp, promoting smoother, healthier hair. With Skin Care mode, it even hydrates your skin—your all-in-one beauty tool for effortless styling and daily nourishment. Panasonic EH-NA9M 吹风机采用独家 nanoe™ 奈米水离子与矿物负离子技术，有效滋润发丝与头皮，告别毛躁，打造柔顺亮泽秀发。Skin Care 模式还能为肌肤补水，一机多用，轻松在家享受沙龙级护理体验

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware's No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there's a perfect container for every freezer storage need. Tupperware 冷冻保鲜 5 件套让备餐和长期储存变得便捷，有效锁住食物的新鲜度。作为 Tupperware 畅销第一的冷冻容器，它采用快速冷冻设计与柔韧材质，冷冻后轻松脱模。多种尺寸组合，能轻松满足各种冷冻储存的需求。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - I-Running X-Fold Exercise Bike
programme.desc: The X-Fold Exercise Bike is a compact, foldable exercise bike designed for small spaces, offering adjustable resistance, an LCD display and Mobile App connectivity for your workout. Its space-saving design makes it ideal for convenient home cardio sessions. I-Running X-Fold折叠运动脚踏车，设计时尚小巧，配有舒适座垫、可调阻力和LCD显示屏，支持手机App连接，适合家庭健身使用。其折叠设计节省空间便于收纳，帮助您在家轻松进行有氧运动，保持体能、身形和肌肉量。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO ePhysio
programme.desc: An upgraded foot reflexology device that helps relieve aches, swelling, and numbness while improving blood circulation. Made in Korea, it uses low-frequency wave technology to gently stimulate muscle movement and support better blood flow. With dual channels for body pads and waist belt, it allows full-body use—helping reduce fatigue, improve circulation, and support overall wellness. OTO e-Physio 电波保健仪，升级版足部理疗设备，有助缓解酸痛、肿胀与麻木，同时促进血液循环。韩国制造，采用低频电波刺激肌肉，帮助带动血流。配备双通道设计，可连接贴片与腰带，实现全身使用，帮助减轻疲劳、改善循环，提升整体健康状态。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker
programme.desc: La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker This La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker provides you with the best of both worlds by combining a hot pot and grill in one appliance. Enjoy versatile meal preparation, whether you’re simmering soups or grilling meats and vegetables! 这款La Gourmet 火焰电饭锅将火锅和烧烤炉结合一体。为您提供两全其美的享受。无论您是煮汤还是烧烤肉类和蔬菜，都能享受多功能的膳食准备！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ascen resources ITOH Sugabloc
programme.desc: A daily blood sugar support supplement from Japan’s ITOH Kanpo. With 4 natural herbal ingredients working together, it helps slow down sugar absorption and reduce post-meal spikes. By keeping glucose levels more stable, it supports better energy, weight control, and heart health—so you can enjoy your meals without worrying about sudden sugar highs. 来自日本井藤汉方的日常控糖配方，结合4大天然草本成分，帮助减缓糖分吸收，稳定餐后血糖。让血糖不再忽高忽低，减少饭后疲倦，同时有助体重管理和心血管健康。让你在享受美食的同时，也能更安心地管理血糖。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kinohimitsu Collagen Diamond Pro
programme.desc: Kinohimitsu’s newly upgraded Collagen Diamond Pro combines 5,500mg of marine collagen peptides with NMN, Resveratrol, and Astaxanthin to rejuvenate your skin from within. It helps reduce fine lines and wrinkles, evens out dullness and pigmentation, and boosts elasticity and hydration—leaving skin firmer, smoother, and radiant. Kinohimitsu全新升级的 Collagen Diamond Pro 胶原蛋白饮，融合5500毫克深海胶原胜肽与NMN、白藜芦醇及虾红素，从内而外激活年轻能量。有效淡化细纹皱纹，改善暗沉与色斑，全面提升肌肤弹性与保湿力，让肌肤更紧致、水润、透亮。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Clean V2 Cordless Vacuum Cleaner
programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Its ultra-strong suction power and multi-stage filtration system capture even the finest dust in your homes. Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery. Acerpure V2 无线吸尘机， 四种刷头，满足全屋清洁需求。 1.37公斤超轻无线主机，轻盈好超控。三档模式，20000pa强劲气旋吸力，灰尘一扫而空。多角度掌控自如，让您更顺畅地左右移动，滑行或转向。轻巧却强劲有力，是您最佳的清洁伙伴。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HQ Ling Zhi
programme.desc: HQ Lingzhi Cracked Spores Powder is formulated and manufactured in Singapore. It enhances the body’s immune system, reduces fatigue, promotes blood circulation, protects the liver, and improves metabolism. HQ 灵芝破壁孢子粉由新加坡配制和生产。它能够增强身体的免疫系统，减少疲劳，促进血液循环，保护肝脏，并改善新陈代谢。

programme.desc: A pair of conniving bush pilots crash-land in the Peruvian jungle, where they come across a community of diamond miners under the thumb of a greedy speculator.

programme.title: The Night Porter
programme.desc: A concentration camp survivor rekindles her sadomasochistic relationship with an ex-SS officer working as a night porter at a Vienna hotel, but his former associates begin stalking them.

programme.title: Violent City
programme.desc: After being double-crossed by his mistress and barely escaping a murder attempt, a hit-man sets out to take his revenge on the woman and the mob boss who put her up to it.

programme.title: All the Way Boys

programme.title: Puyah & Putat
programme.desc: Kisah pengembaraan Puyah, seorang gadis kampung becok yang disukai ramai, apabila dia melawat Kuala Lumpur dan termasuk set filem secara tak sengaja, dan tak semena-mena mula mendapat nama sebagai pelakon.

programme.title: Ting Tong, Love
programme.desc: Bored by his mother's insistence on his getting married, Hairi finally agrees on the condition that he could choose his own soul mate. Does the choice of Hairi meet with his mother's approval?

programme.title: Chomel
programme.desc: After her mother's death, Mimi's family fell apart. One day, Mimi finds Chomel, a cat and brings it home, only for it to cause a series of events that brings her broken family back together again.

programme.title: My Future Husband
programme.desc: Emily berharap untuk menemui bakal suami dan pada suatu hari muncul seorang lelaki bernama Atta yang mengaku dia adalah suami Emily dari masa hadapan.

programme.title: Perangkap Perkahwinan
programme.desc: Three best friends promised to get married, at the same time when they turn 26 years old. Their perceptions of marriage life begin to change and conflict ensues.

programme.title: Cik Puan Sinderella
programme.desc: This is a lighthearted family drama about a teenage girl who is closely guarded by her mother.

programme.title: Anak Kerak

programme.title: Jatuh Cinta Buta
programme.desc: Telefilem komedi romantik tentang perkenalan singkat di antara Zulin, seorang gadis yang tidak pernah bercinta, dengan Izlan, seorang duda dalam satu 'blind date' yang diaturkan oleh Nadya Ramanshah.

programme.title: Matahari
programme.desc: Fauzi seorang guru yang telah dihantar untuk berkhidmat di Sabah. Di sana dia telah berkenalan dengan seorang novelis yang sedang mengalami masalah ‘writer’s block’ iaitu Yazid.

programme.title: Meniti Cinta Di Starimost
programme.desc: Iman dipaksa berkahwin dengan Qaseh, anak kepada orang gajinya untuk mewarisi harta bapanya. Percutian mereka di Bosnia membuahkan bibit-bibit cinta. Lakonan Iqram Dinzly, Zarina Zainoordin dan Yana Shamsudin.

programme.title: Jula Juli Bintang Putus Cinta
programme.desc: Telemovie sekuel Jula Juli Bintang Cinta kini kembali! Kali ini, Jula dan Juli mengalami konflik percintaan dengan Dani & Izham sehingga mereka memutuskan untuk berpisah dan melarikan diri ke kampung Juli.

programme.title: Kampung Kuala Lambat
programme.desc: Kampung Kuala Lambat bagai mengalami sumpahan apabila lelaki yang berkahwin muda akan mati di hari pernikahan mereka namun kejadian ganjil ini tidak berlaku kepada lelaki yang berusia 60 tahun ke atas.

programme.title: Musnahkan Pelamin Anganku
programme.desc: Mikael yang merupakan seorang wedding planner menerima tawaran besar untuk menjayakan sebuah majlis perkahwinan pelanggannya. Namun majlis perkahwinan tersebut merupakan majlis bekas isterinya.

programme.title: Dua
programme.desc: Kisah Farhan yang kehilangan kembarnya Fahrin dalam satu kemalangan tragis. Dia kemudiannya mengambil-alih kehidupan Fahrin namun terperangkap dalam sebuah cinta tiga segi pula. Lakonan Eusoff Hashim dan Sharifah Sakinah.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - It Takes One to Grow One / Smells Like Teen Stink - EP107
programme.desc: JD's ultimate fertilizer is slowly turning him into a plant and it's up to the team to get him back to the lab in time to cure him! / When Kent's super B.O. makes him reluctant to appear on a prized comic con panel, the Secret Lab kids have to find a way to Stop the Stink.

programme.title: Mellodees - Wheels On The Bus - EP5
programme.desc: Dee rides the school bus on his way to class. Is that Marshmello driving the bus?

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep14 - EP114
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Tibbs in Charge - EP119
programme.desc: A mystery is afoot, toys have gone missing and it's up to the Shaq Pack to figure out what happened.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep3 - EP103
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep4 - EP4
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Habits - EP109
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover that habits are the result of repeating good action until it becomes part of our routine. All of our activities are very important! That's why you should give a very special place for rest, for having fun, and for sharing with your friends and family. We will also learn about the importance of punctuality!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Forgiveness - EP110
programme.desc: In this episode, we will go on an expedition to the Planet of Forgiveness and learn that forgiveness is an act of love that helps us overcome anger and misunderstandings and that when we forgive we see things with more clarity. And most importantly, when we recognize our mistakes we realize the importance of asking for forgiveness through our hearts.

programme.title: Mellodees - Twinkle Twinkle Little Star - EP4

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Forgiveness - EP110

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Highlights - EP 75
programme.desc: Germany face Paraguay in a clash between European pedigree and South American resilience. Germany will be looking to take another step towards the trophy, while Paraguay hope to continue their memorable campaign. The reward for the winner is a place in the Round of 16.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Highlights - EP 76
programme.desc: The Netherlands face Morocco in a blockbuster Round of 32 showdown as both sides chase a place in the last 16. The Dutch will rely on their attacking flair and tournament experience, while Morocco aim to upset another European heavyweight with their disciplined defence and dangerous counter-attacks in what promises to be an enthralling knockout battle.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Day Express - EP 23
programme.desc: Match Day Express brings you the goals, the plays, and the heroes of all 104 matches of the FIFA World Cup 2026!

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Round of 32: Australia vs Egypt
programme.desc: Australia and Egypt meet in a tightly balanced encounter with progression on the line. Both teams have exceeded expectations to reach this stage and will be eager to continue their journey into the Round of 16.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Highlights - EP 82
programme.desc: Mini-Stories for FIFA World Cup 2026. The FIFA World Cup 2026 is the largest edition ever, featuring 48 teams and 104 matches across Canada, Mexico, and the United States from June 11 to July 19, 2026.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Highlights - EP 83
programme.desc: Spain face Austria in a contest between two sides that impressed during the group stage. Spain hope to continue their push for another world title, while Austria are looking to reach the Round of 16 with another strong performance.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Highlights - EP 84
programme.desc: Portugal and Croatia meet in a battle between two experienced footballing nations. Both teams have ambitions of progressing deep into the tournament, and victory here secures a place in the Round of 16.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Highlights - EP 85
programme.desc: Switzerland and Algeria go head-to-head in a high-stakes FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 clash, with a place in the Round of 16 on the line. Switzerland's disciplined approach meets Algeria's fearless determination in a winner-takes-all encounter where every chance could prove decisive.

programme.title: (Live) FIFA World Cup 2026 - Pre-Show - Round of 16: Canada vs Morocco
programme.desc: History beckons as Canada and Morocco collide in the FIFA World Cup Round of 16. It's a clash of contrasting styles—Canada's speed and attacking intent against Morocco's defensive discipline and tactical patience..

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kale Powder
programme.desc: The Kale is a superfood packed with 23 essential nutrients to support daily dietary needs. Our organic pure kale powder contains no additives, preservatives, added antioxidants, or colorants, making it suitable for all ages to maintain a healthy lifestyle. 羽衣甘蓝是一种富含23种必需营养素的超级食物，可满足日常膳食需求。我们的有机纯羽衣甘蓝粉无添加剂、防腐剂、抗氧化剂和色素，适合所有年龄段人群，有助于保持健康.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Naturalle Sugar Care Tea
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including gymnema, mulberry and green tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods. Naturalle 糖适宁茶采用 100% 天然叶材精制而成，包括匙羹藤、桑叶与绿茶，口感清淡、低热量。糖适宁茶是适合餐后饮用，有助于抑制对甜食的渴望和维持血糖健康水平，非常适合经常摄取高碳水或含糖食物的人士饮用

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Omron Electronic Nerve Stimulator
programme.desc: Compact & intuitive design massager that allows you to treat specific pain areas wherever you are. 微电流电疗结合热敷功能，帮助舒缓疼痛的好帮手，哪里痛就贴哪里！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - i-Running TM-299 Foldable Treadmill
programme.desc: Compact, slim, and ready to use straight out of the box. Walk or jog anytime with quiet operation, shock absorption for joint comfort, and adjustable speed and incline. Fold it flat for easy storage—your convenient home fitness solution. 轻巧省空间，开箱即用。安静运行、减震护膝，可调速度与坡度，适合快走与慢跑。折叠后薄至12公分，轻松收纳床底或靠墙摆放，让居家运动更轻松自在。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ellixi Hair Revival Shampoo
programme.desc: A breakthrough 4-in-1 formula that colors, nourishes, volumizes, and strengthens hair—while improving scalp health in just 5 days. Powered by Korean patented polyphenol technology, it offers safe, natural grey coverage without harsh chemicals, leaving hair darker, fuller, and healthier with every wash. Ellixi发量黑洗发水，采用颠覆性的4合1配方：洗头同时染发、护发、增发量并强韧发丝，仅需5天即可改善头皮与发质。采用韩国专利多酚技术，无需染发剂或化学添加，温和自然遮盖白发。结合多酚氧化着色原理与草本养护成分，让秀发一洗更黑、更丰盈、更健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kplass Cough and Flu Relief Patch
programme.desc: Drug-free patches use Far Infrared and acupoint therapy to relieve cold and flu symptoms naturally. The Cold & Flu Patch eases a blocked nose, sinus pressure and chills. The Cough Relief Patch comes in adult and child versions to soothe coughs and calm throat irritation for easier breathing. Safe for daily use, they offer up to 6 hours of comfort for the whole family. 无需药物的贴布，结合远红外线和穴位疗法，自然缓解感冒症状。感冒缓解贴舒缓鼻塞、流鼻涕、鼻窦压力和寒冷不适。止咳贴有成人装和儿童装，帮助缓解咳嗽、喉咙不适，同时促进血液循环，让呼吸更顺畅、睡眠更安心。温和贴肤，每天可用，长达6小时舒适守护，全家都适用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware's No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there's a perfect container for every freezer storage need. Tupperware 冷冻保鲜 5 件套让备餐和长期储存变得便捷，有效锁住食物的新鲜度。作为 Tupperware 畅销第一的冷冻容器，它采用快速冷冻设计与柔韧材质，冷冻后轻松脱模。多种尺寸组合，能轻松满足各种冷冻储存的需求。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature's Farm® Mirtogenol Plus+
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Mirtogenol Plus+ is a clinically tested eye health formula developed by ophthalmologists and scientists from the UK and Italy. Powered by two powerful antioxidants—Pycnogenol® and Mirtoselect®—with Citrus Bioflavonoids, it supports healthy eye pressure, improves microcirculation, and helps protect against daily screen-related eye stress. It helps reduce eye fatigue, dryness, and blurred vision for clearer, more comfortable vision. Nature’s Farm Mirtogenol Plus+ 为眼科医生及英意科研团队研发的临床护眼配方，结合两大强效抗氧化成分 Pycnogenol® 法国松树皮与 Mirtoselect® 欧洲蓝莓，并添加柑橘类黄酮，有助改善眼部微循环、支持健康眼压、对抗用眼压力与氧化损伤，缓解眼睛干涩、疲劳与模糊感，让视力更清晰、更舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ascen resources ITOH Sugabloc
programme.desc: A daily blood sugar support supplement from Japan’s ITOH Kanpo. With 4 natural herbal ingredients working together, it helps slow down sugar absorption and reduce post-meal spikes. By keeping glucose levels more stable, it supports better energy, weight control, and heart health—so you can enjoy your meals without worrying about sudden sugar highs. 来自日本井藤汉方的日常控糖配方，结合4大天然草本成分，帮助减缓糖分吸收，稳定餐后血糖。让血糖不再忽高忽低，减少饭后疲倦，同时有助体重管理和心血管健康。让你在享受美食的同时，也能更安心地管理血糖。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Clean V2 Cordless Vacuum Cleaner
programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Its ultra-strong suction power and multi-stage filtration system capture even the finest dust in your homes. Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery. Acerpure V2 无线吸尘机， 四种刷头，满足全屋清洁需求。 1.37公斤超轻无线主机，轻盈好超控。三档模式，20000pa强劲气旋吸力，灰尘一扫而空。多角度掌控自如，让您更顺畅地左右移动，滑行或转向。轻巧却强劲有力，是您最佳的清洁伙伴。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Clynn by Nature Hair Regrowth Bundle
programme.desc: A simple, plant based organic three-step system designed to naturally restore scalp health, block DHT, and revive dormant roots for noticeably thicker, fuller hair. Safe for anyone above 4 yrs old and stop Excessive Hair Shedding in One Week! 一款天然有机的植物萃取养护头皮头发系统，有助于恢复头皮健康、抑制双氢睾酮（DHT），并激活休眠毛囊，让秀发显著加密更显丰盈。安全温和，4岁以上人群均可放心使用，助您在短短一周内有效减少过度掉发！

programme.title: Mellodees - London Bridge Is Falling Down - EP6
programme.desc: Playtime gets interrupted when Dee's four-legged friend, Treble knocks down his creation. No need to get upset though, Dee and Treble rebuild the bridge while smiling and laughing together. A great display of teamwork.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep15 - EP115
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Gronk Did It! - EP120
programme.desc: A day volunteering at the Orlanta Animal Reserve turns into an ordeal as an elephant escapes its enclosure.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep4 - EP104
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep5 - EP5
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Forgiveness - EP110
programme.desc: In this episode, we will go on an expedition to the Planet of Forgiveness and learn that forgiveness is an act of love that helps us overcome anger and misunderstandings and that when we forgive we see things with more clarity. And most importantly, when we recognize our mistakes we realize the importance of asking for forgiveness through our hearts.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Courage - EP111
programme.desc: In this episode, we will explore the corners of outer space where only the brave ones can reach. Curious will teach us that being brave doesn't mean being afraid, but acting in spite of fear. We will discover that courage is inside each one of us and that "determination" allows us to face our fears, while "will" pushes us to do things with passion.

programme.title: Mellodees - Wheels On The Bus - EP5
programme.desc: Dee rides the school bus on his way to class. Is that Marshmello driving the bus?

programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Flammable Forest - EP202

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - To Catch a Truck - EP111
programme.desc: Shaq's special painting is stolen, It's up to the Shaq Paq to find the thief and recover the work of art.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Monster Smash / A Monster of a Mystery - EP108
programme.desc: When JD and Kent's battle bot, Monster Smash, escapes from the lab, the Secret Lab Kids must navigate a maze to find it. / When JD and Kent believe that the dreaded Whomper is lurking outside the lab, Kent is terrified. JD hopes to become famous for discovering an unknown creature. The team must use science to determine if it's really a monster or if they can correctly classify it as some other animal.

programme.title: Mellodees - London Bridge Is Falling Down - EP6
programme.desc: Playtime gets interrupted when Dee's four-legged friend, Treble knocks down his creation. No need to get upset though, Dee and Treble rebuild the bridge while smiling and laughing together. A great display of teamwork.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep15 - EP115
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Gronk Did It! - EP120
programme.desc: A day volunteering at the Orlanta Animal Reserve turns into an ordeal as an elephant escapes its enclosure.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep4 - EP104
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep5 - EP5
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Forgiveness - EP110
programme.desc: In this episode, we will go on an expedition to the Planet of Forgiveness and learn that forgiveness is an act of love that helps us overcome anger and misunderstandings and that when we forgive we see things with more clarity. And most importantly, when we recognize our mistakes we realize the importance of asking for forgiveness through our hearts.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Courage - EP111
programme.desc: In this episode, we will explore the corners of outer space where only the brave ones can reach. Curious will teach us that being brave doesn't mean being afraid, but acting in spite of fear. We will discover that courage is inside each one of us and that "determination" allows us to face our fears, while "will" pushes us to do things with passion.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Humility - EP112
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn the importance of humility. We will understand how to have good sportsmanship and respect the efforts of your opponent.
